options.text: I think the jacket is dirty overall.
Can you check the left pocket? There’s a stain there.
There’s a coffee stain on the right cuff—could you clean it properly?
I don’t like how this jacket looks now.

content.situation: 顾客在洗衣店取回衣物时，发现一件外套袖口有咖啡渍，需要向店员说明具体位置和污渍类型
content.explanation: 正确答案准确指出了污渍类型（coffee stain）和具体位置（right cuff），并自然提出请求，符合高频表达习惯。干扰项1和4过于笼统或情绪化，未说明具体污渍；干扰项2错误指定了位置，属于答非所问。
content.speakerText: There's a coffee stain on the right cuff of this jacket.
content.speakerTextCn: 这件夹克的右袖口有咖啡渍。

options.text: The jeans smell bad after washing.
There’s an oil stain on the knee—please pay extra attention to it.
Can you wash all my clothes again?
I think the stain is on the pocket.

content.situation: 顾客在送洗一条牛仔裤时，发现膝盖处有油渍，需要明确告知店员污渍位置以便重点处理
content.explanation: 正确答案精准描述了污渍类型（oil stain）和位置（knee），并使用礼貌请求表达（pay extra attention），符合专业沟通规范。干扰项1涉及气味而非污渍；干扰项3泛化请求，未说明具体问题；干扰项4错误定位污渍位置，属于理解偏差。
content.speakerText: I noticed an oil stain right here on the knee.
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到膝盖这里有个油渍。
